Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Dispostiion Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Rebecca Tovar, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3775.

Timothy J. Kodani, Esq. appeared with petitioner Ursula Cruz, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Shanee Mimmitt, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Cruz Guardian ad Litem for Shanee Mimmitt was filed on May 7, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $280.00.

The net balance of $6,720.00 shall be used to establish a Special Needs Trust for Claimant, Shanee Mimmitt.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the establishment and funding of the Special Needs Trust for claimant, Shanee Mimmitt.

Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Andre Rucker (925-695-6641) appears in person as plaintiff/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Attorney Timothy J. Kodani's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel of Record for plaintiff, Andre Rucker is DENIED.

Mr. Rucker attempts to make an oral motion for judgment. The Court indicates that an oral motion for judgment is not appropriate at this time and suggests he seek counsel. Mr. Rucker becomes agitated and is escorted out of the courtroom by the bailiff.
